ReactiveUI.description: A composable, cross-platform model-view-viewmodel framework for all .NET platforms; the most popular MVVM library in the Avalonia ecosystem
ReactiveUI.usage: Use ReactiveObject as your ViewModel base class; use WhenAnyValue, WhenAnyObservable, and ReactiveCommand for reactive bindings

CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.description: Microsoft's lightweight, fast, and modular MVVM library with source generators for observable properties and commands
CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.usage: Use [ObservableProperty] attribute to generate bindable properties; use [RelayCommand] for command generation

Prism.Avalonia.description: Prism framework port for Avalonia providing modular application infrastructure with region-based navigation and dialog service
Prism.Avalonia.usage: Use PrismApplication as the App base class; register modules with IModuleCatalog; use IRegionManager for navigation

Semi.Avalonia.description: A port of Semi Design (by ByteDance) providing a modern, clean UI theme with light and dark modes

Material.Avalonia.description: Material Design 3 (Material You) theme for Avalonia with dynamic color support
Material.Avalonia.usage: Replace default theme with MaterialTheme in App.axaml; use MaterialDesignTheme resource dictionary

FluentAvalonia.description: Brings WinUI 3 / Fluent Design controls and styles to Avalonia including NavigationView, InfoBar, and more
FluentAvalonia.usage: Add FluentAvaloniaTheme to App.axaml; use FA namespace for extra controls like NavigationView

Citrus.Avalonia.description: A set of fresh, juicy Avalonia themes with vibrant color options
Citrus.Avalonia.usage: Include one of the theme styles (Rust, Candy, SeaFoam, Magma) in App.axaml

LiveCharts2.description: Animated, responsive charts library with Avalonia, WPF, WinForms, and Blazor support
LiveCharts2.usage: Add LiveCharts control to XAML and bind ISeries[] from ViewModel

OxyPlot.Avalonia.description: A cross-platform plotting library with rich scientific chart types
OxyPlot.Avalonia.usage: Use PlotView control with a PlotModel containing Series definitions

ScottPlot.Avalonia.description: Fast interactive data plotting library optimized for large datasets
ScottPlot.Avalonia.usage: Add AvaPlot control to XAML and call myPlot.Plot.Add.* methods in code-behind
key_features: Renders millions of points at 60+ fps

AvaloniaEdit.description: Port of AvalonEdit (from SharpDevelop/ILSpy), providing a powerful code editor control with syntax highlighting
AvaloniaEdit.usage: Use TextEditor control in XAML; configure SyntaxHighlighting via HighlightingManager

Avalonia.DataGrid.description: Official DataGrid control for Avalonia with sorting, grouping, and editing

Dock.Avalonia.description: A docking layout system for building IDE-like UIs with draggable, dockable panels
Dock.Avalonia.usage: Define a DockControl in XAML with a factory and layout; implement IDockFactory

Avalonia.Xaml.Behaviors.description: XAML Behaviors for Avalonia: attach reusable interaction logic without code-behind
Avalonia.Xaml.Behaviors.usage: Attach behaviors via <i:Interaction.Behaviors> in XAML; use EventTriggerBehavior, DataTriggerBehavior

AsyncImageLoader.Avalonia.description: Provides async loading of images from URLs for the Avalonia Image control
AsyncImageLoader.Avalonia.usage: Replace Image Source binding with asyncImageLoader:ImageLoader.Source attached property

AvaloniaILSpy.description: Avalonia port of the ILSpy .NET decompiler – a real-world example of a complex, production Avalonia app

WalletWasabi.description: Privacy-focused Bitcoin wallet (Windows, Linux, macOS) – one of the most mature Avalonia apps in production

Ryujinx.description: Nintendo Switch emulator with excellent accuracy; uses Avalonia for its cross-platform UI

SourceGit.description: Cross-platform Git desktop client built with Avalonia – a clean example of a file-system-heavy Avalonia app

RoslynPad.description: Cross-platform C# editor powered by Roslyn and AvalonEdit; demonstrates editor integration patterns

documentation.description: Official AvaloniaUI documentation covering controls, styles, binding, animation, and deployment

quick_guides.description: Official collection of minimal working examples for common Avalonia tasks

samples.description: Community-contributed samples for specific Avalonia features

awesome_avalonia.description: Curated list of Avalonia libraries, tools, and open-source applications
